title: selenipedium × pulchellum
intro: Selenipedium × pulchellum, a hybrid orchid species, is a type of terrestrial orchid that combines the characteristics of two parent species, Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium ishingeri. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selenipedium × pulchellum include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Selenipedium × pulchellum typically involve drying the plant material and using it in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
